MODULE: cosmos.integration.external.db_manager
FILE: cosmos/integration/external/db_manager.py (52 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Database Manager - Universal SQL Access.

"Data is the new oil, and I'm the one who knows how to refine it."

This module provides safe, read-only access to local/remote databases.

CLASSES:
- DatabaseSkill
  Methods: async def execute_query(self, query: str) -> List[Dict]
  Methods: def get_schema(self) -> str
